source_name: Code4rena Spectra Findings and Analysis Report (2024-02)
finding_title: All yield generated in the IBT vault can be drained by performing a vault deflation attack using the flash loan functionality of the Principal Token contract
summary: The current implementation of the PrincipalToken has a flash lending functionality:
root_cause: PrincipalToken flash-loan functionality enables a vault deflation attack that drains IBT vault yield through manipulated share accounting
broken_invariants: vault state transitions must remain internally consistent under the root cause: PrincipalToken flash-loan functionality enables a vault deflation attack that drains IBT vault yield through manipulated share accounting
state changes must remain internally consistent across all affected accounting buckets and external integrations
attack_preconditions: the affected component is deployed or configured in the way described by the final report
the report-described user, keeper, vault, connector, oracle, or liquidation flow is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, keeper, liquidator, vault participant, or protocol-integrated actor able to trigger the affected flow
trigger_actions: execute the report-described function sequence or state transition
observe mispricing, accounting drift, value loss, fund lock, or denial of service

impact.description: The current implementation of the PrincipalToken has a flash lending functionality:

why_not_higher: final C4 severity is Medium; exploitability, affected value, or preconditions are bounded relative to High
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with public report evidence and affected code/finding references
common_false_positive_angles: verify the same component and configuration are in scope
check whether the issue is reachable by an untrusted or economically motivated actor
confirm the impact is more than a view-only mismatch, dust loss, or privileged-only misconfiguration
mitigations: In the PrincipalToken::flashLoan function, verify that the IBT rate/price has not decreased once the flash loan has been repaid: function flashLoan( IERC3156FlashBorrower _receiver, address _token, uint256 _amount, bytes calldata _data ) external override returns (bool) { if (_amount > maxFlashLoan(_token)) revert FlashLoanExceedsMaxAmount(); uint256 fee = flashFee(_token, _amount); _updateFees(fee); + uint256 initialIBTRate = IERC4626(ibt).convertToAssets(ibtUnit); // Initiate the flash loan by lending the requested IBT amount IERC20(ibt).safeTransfer(address(_receiver), _amount); // Execute the flash loan if (_receiver.onFlashLoan(msg.sender, _token, _amount, fee, _data) != ON_FLASH_LOAN) revert FlashLoanCallbackFailed(); // Repay the debt + fee IERC20(ibt).safeTransferFrom(address(_receiver), address(this), _amount + fee); + uint256 postLoanRepaymentIBTRate = IERC4626(ibt).convertToAssets(ibtUnit); + if (postLoanRepaymentIBTRate < initialIBTRate) revert FlashLoanDecreasedIBTRate(); return true; }
